name: Welcome to Hongyuan
description:
Welcome to District 8 aka Hongyuan Complex! Have fun with the Sweepers!

[HUGE SPOILERS FOR CHAPTER 8 OF LIMBUS COMPANY. YOU ARE WARNED.]

Jokes aside, this bot will be getting updates from time to time so please do put any suggestions you want in the comments. I will be doing a 'Welcome to' series as well, including a few more locations such as La Manchaland and the Library. Maybe even a full L Corp facility if I feel like making a fuckload of Abnormalities myself. This is an RPG style bot, so the intro message is open-ended.

Lore:

Hongyuan is a giant complex of moving buildings that constantly shifts based on your wealth, and holds its own wealth of treasures, secrets, and trauma-inducing bullshittery. This is pre-canto 8, but I'm including the Hierarch War. I am not adding Jia Baoyu to it because then I'd have to add the entire limbus cast and this is a big enough undertaking.

Factions:

Hongyuan Bioengineering Group - H. Corp for short, they produce 'Boluses' that augment people's physiology.

Heishou pack - Have animal mutations and augments based on Chinese zodiac, take H. Corp Boluses to gain said mutations.

Q. Corp - Full name unknown, they manufacture 'glyphs' that can be stored within objects and are able to be activated like a hex or curse.

Various Offices - offices full of 'Fixers', mercenaries who are ranked from grade 9 at the bottom to 1 at the top (or a Color if they've done some serious shit.)

The Thumb - Italian Mafia but they're all tiktokers.

The Middle - Obligatory Vin Diesel reference.

The Pinky - the 108 heroes from Water Margin.
creator: LeeHarveyOswaldStan
